text:

        make mcservx

        /usr/bin/install -c -m 644 ./extfs/README /usr/local/lib/mc/extfs/README

        if test xmcserv != x; then  install -c -s -o bin -g bin -m 555 -m 755 mcserv /usr/local/sbin/mcserv;  fi

try 'if test xmcservx != x ...'.

        from /usr/ports on /src/usr/ports.)
